children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: From the amount reserved under section 1810(b), the Attorney General shall make grants to Indian tribes for programs to strengthen tribal juvenile justice systems and to hold tribal youth accountable.1See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Eligibility
children.label: b Eligibility
children.text: Indian tribes, as defined by , or a consortia of such tribes, shall submit to the Attorney General an application in such form and containing such information as the Attorney General may require. Only tribes that carry out tribal juvenile justice functions shall be eligible to receive a grant under this section.section 5130 of title 25

children.heading: Awards
children.label: c Awards
children.text: The Attorney General shall award grants under this section on a competitive basis.

children.heading: Guidelines
children.label: d Guidelines
children.text: The Attorney General shall issue guidelines establishing application, use, and award criteria and processes consistent with the purposes and requirements of this Act.
